_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: the rats transplanted with the LV-NF-1-treated NSCs achieved notably better BBB scores than those in the other injured groups in each evaluation from the 2nd week
details: Successfully assessed locomotor recovery in SCI rats, with LV-NF-1 NSC-treated rats achieving significantly higher BBB scores than other groups from week 2 through week 8
